releaseBlockingGates.description: Post-merge CI aggregate that proves trusted main verification lanes are green.
Deploy workflow aggregate that enforces local deploy prerequisites and upstream gate status.
OWASP ZAP DAST gate executed inside the deploy workflow before production promotion.
Release reliability indicators gate enforcing critical check pass-rate, flake threshold, and rollback drill recency before production promotion.
Verifies runtime code matches architecture documentation claims (eventing stack, agent inventory, deployment entities). Fails if docs and code diverge.
coverage: eventing stack claims (MessageBus, BullMQ, NATS JetStream)

releaseBlockingGates.description: Verifies child_process.exec (from dev.ts) is absent from the production backend bundle. Prevents latent RCE risk from dev route code shipping in production.
coverage: child_process import absent from production bundle
dev route registration absent from production bundle

releaseBlockingGates.description: Fails if any K8s base manifest sets LOG_LEVEL to warn/error/fatal. The shared logger defaults to info in production; a more restrictive override silently drops audit-critical info/warn logs from auth, tenant, and subscription paths.
coverage: K8s base manifests set LOG_LEVEL to info or debug
shared logger audit trail visibility in production

releaseBlockingGates.description: Fails if any production-path env file or K8s/Helm manifest sets MFA_ENABLED=false. MFA defaults to enabled in code; this gate catches explicit opt-outs.
coverage: production env files do not disable MFA
K8s/Helm manifests do not disable MFA

releaseBlockingGates.description: Verifies required compliance evidence documents exist and are non-empty. Blocks production promotion when evidence artifacts are missing.
